ddls:
CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tables" (
  "table_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each table */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source the table belongs to */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the table was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the table was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the table (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "schema_version" TEXT /* Version of the table schema */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("table_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tables_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fields" (
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each field */,
  "table_id" INTEGER /* ID of the table the field belongs to */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the field (e.g., integer, string) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the field */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the field was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the field was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the field (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "is_nullable" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the field can be null */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the field */,
  "constraints" TEXT /* Any constraints on the field (e.g., unique, primary key) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fields_table_id FOREIGN KEY ("table_id") REFERENCES tables ("table_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "field_metadata" (
  "field_metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each field metadata entry */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* ID of the field the metadata belongs to */,
  "explicit_name" TEXT /* Explicit name of the field */,
  "inferred_name" TEXT /* Inferred name of the field */,
  "explicit_data_type" TEXT /* Explicit data type of the field */,
  "inferred_data_type" TEXT /* Inferred data type of the field */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the field metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the field metadata was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the field metadata (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "confidence_score" INTEGER /* Confidence score for the inferred metadata (0-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_field_metadata_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("field_id") REFERENCES fields ("field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_categories" (
  "data_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data category */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* ID of the field the category belongs to */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data category was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the data category (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_categories_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("field_id") REFERENCES fields ("field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created this user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the metadata */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* ID of the field being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the metadata was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string from which the access occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("field_id") REFERENCES fields ("field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* ID of the field the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the metadata */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created this version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the version (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("field_id") REFERENCES fields ("field_id")
)
